content: We can adapt the 2025 configurable ICM curiosity mechanism for swarm UAVs to drive active spreading activation in large language model associative recall, turning passive RAG document retrieval into an intrinsically rewarded exploratory search process. ICM’s intrinsic reward for novel state discovery can prioritize under-activated, low-salience concept connections that standard spreading activation RAG misses, unlocking unexpected associative links that improve creative and open-domain retrieval tasks.
source_topics: **Spreading Activation for large language model associative recall
